author: FARA
name: ChannelList
description: Post and maintain a directory of every category and channel in one or more embeds, using each channel's topic as its description. Channel visibility is based on a configurable role, and the posted list updates automatically when channels change, editing the existing embeds in place when possible or reposting when it has to grow.
install_msg:
Thanks for installing ChannelList!

**Quick Setup:**
1. `[p]channellistset channel #channel` - Where the list is posted
2. `[p]channellistset role @role` - Base visibility on this role (optional, defaults to @everyone)
3. `[p]channellist post` - Publish the list

**Handy Commands:**
• `[p]channellist update` - Refresh the list now
• `[p]channellistset settings` - Review the configuration
• `[p]channellistset ignore #channel` - Hide a channel or category
• `[p]channellistset autoupdate` - Toggle automatic updates

The list refreshes on its own whenever a channel is created, deleted, renamed, moved, or its topic or permissions change.
short: Directory of all categories and channels with auto updates
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores channel and message IDs and the configured list text per guild. It does not store any personal data.
